content: Curiosity-driven intrinsic motivation mechanisms (like ICM and RND from Topic A) can be repurposed to generate the uncertainty scores required for uncertainty-based memory sample selection (from Topic B), creating a self-reinforcing cycle where an active agent’s innate desire to explore directly improves the quality of its working memory replay. This eliminates the need for hand-designed uncertainty estimation heuristics by aligning memory pruning with the agent’s natural exploratory drive.
source_topics: Uncertainty-based memory sample selection for deep active agents
